data.title: Account with over $4 million in profit and a total purchase of $360,000: Cavaliers defeat Lakers in NBA regular season game.
data.description: According to Odaily Seer, an account (address: 0xc2e7800b5af46e6093872b177b7a5e7f0563be51) with over $4 million in profits purchased $360,000 worth of bets on the Cavaliers defeating the Lakers in the Polymarket "NBA Regular Season Cavaliers vs. Lakers" prediction event, with an opening price of 44.8¢. The NBA regular season game between the Cavaliers and the Lakers will start at 10:30 AM Beijing time today. The NBA regular season is currently nearing its end, with the Cavaliers holding a 47-28 record, ranking 4th in the Eastern Conference; the Lakers have a 49-26 record, ranking 3rd in the Western Conference. Odaily Seer continuously monitors the prediction market, anticipating changes before prices are set.

data.title: Cavaliers vs. Lakers NBA Game Sparks Significant Betting Activity
data.description:
A notable betting event has emerged in the Polymarket prediction market surrounding the NBA regular season game between the Cleveland Cavaliers and the Los Angeles Lakers. According to Odaily, an account with profits exceeding $4 million has invested $360,000 on the Cavaliers defeating the Lakers, with an opening price of 44.8 cents.

The game is scheduled to start at 10:30 AM UTC+8 today. As the NBA regular season nears its conclusion, the Cavaliers hold a record of 47 wins and 28 losses, placing them fourth in the Eastern Conference. Meanwhile, the Lakers have achieved 49 wins and 26 losses, securing the third position in the Western Conference.

data.title: Cryptocurrency stocks showed mixed performance, with ETH approaching $2100 and AI stocks falling nearly 10%.
data.description: According to SoSoValue data, both the US and Iran have expressed their willingness to cease hostilities. The crypto market sector showed mixed performance, with Ethereum (ETH) rising 0.93% and approaching $2,100, but the AI ​​sector fell 9.84% in 24 hours. Within the AI ​​sector, Siren (SIREN) fell sharply by 79.02%, and Kite (KITE) fell by 9.03%. In other sectors, the RWA sector rose 0.87% in the last 24 hours, with Ondo Finance (ONDO) up 2.94%; the DePIN sector rose 0.77%, with Render (RENDER) up 3.14%; the CeFi sector rose 0.24%, with Bitget Token (BGB) up 0.34%; the Layer 2 sector rose 0.08%, with Optimism (OP) up 1.30%; in addition, the PayFi sector fell 0.20%, with Telcoin (TEL) up 2.48%; the DeFi sector fell 0.49%, with EdgeX (EDGE), which launched yesterday, rising 332.33%; the Layer 1 sector fell 0.53%, with Algorand (ALGO) bucking the trend and rising 19.64%; the Meme sector fell 3.18%, with MemeCore (M) rising 1.78% intraday. The crypto sector indices, which reflect the historical performance of the sector, show that the ssiRWA, ssiDePIN, and ssiLayer2 indices rose by 0.77%, 0.21%, and 0.10%, respectively.

data.title: Whale Trader Achieves Consecutive Wins with Leveraged Bitcoin Short
data.description: A whale trader known as 'pension-usdt.eth' has achieved 20 consecutive successful trades since February 18, amassing a total profit of $30.46 million. According to BlockBeats On-chain Detection, the trader has recently opened a short position on 500 BTC using 3x leverage.

data.title: Polymarket's prediction that "Iran will be disqualified from the World Cup before April 30th" has plummeted to 11%, a 12% drop in 24 hours.
data.description: According to Odaily Seer, FIFA President Gianni Infantino stated today that Iran will still participate in the World Cup and play in the United States. Polymarket's probability of Iran being disqualified from the World Cup before April 30th briefly plummeted to 11%, a 12% drop in 24 hours. FIFA President Infantino said he will do everything possible to support the Iranian team. Iran is scheduled to play all of its Group G matches in the United States, two in Los Angeles and one in Seattle. Previously, the Iranian Football Federation had been pushing to move the team's three World Cup group stage matches from the United States to Mexico. The Iranian Ministry of Sports has banned the national team and club sports teams from traveling to countries it considers hostile until further notice. Odaily Seer continuously monitors the prediction market, seeing changes before pricing them in.

data.title: Pension-usdt.eth, a major whale, has opened another short position in Bitcoin with 3x leverage, currently holding 500 BTC.
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, the whale pension-usdt.eth has won 20 consecutive trades since February 18, accumulating profits of $30.46 million. Today, the whale struck again, opening a short position of 500 BTC with 3x leverage, with a notional value of approximately $33.9 million.

data.description: According to Onchain Lens, Vitalik sold Meme coins for $30,000 worth of ETH, and also sent 70,000 USDC and 44 ETH to Railgun.

data.title: Bitget has launched USD-based EDGE perpetual contracts with leverage ranging from 1x to 20x.
data.description: According to an official announcement, Bitget has launched USDT-based EDGE perpetual contracts with leverage ranging from 1x to 20x. Contract trading bots will also be available simultaneously.

data.title: April Crypto Market Faces Key Events and Regulatory Developments
data.description:
The cryptocurrency market in April is set to experience significant developments, with macroeconomic decisions, regulatory advancements, token unlocks, and industry activities all occurring simultaneously. According to PANews, the Federal Open Market Committee (FOMC) rate decision and a press conference by U.S. President Donald Trump are scheduled for the end of the month, marking a crucial period for global liquidity.

The draft of the Clarity Act is expected to be released in early April, providing another important observation point for the U.S. digital asset regulatory framework. Additionally, key economic data such as the U.S. March non-farm payrolls, Consumer Price Index (CPI), and the final value of the U.S. March S&P Global Manufacturing PMI, along with the Federal Reserve meeting minutes, will be published, continuing the interplay between macroeconomic expectations and risk appetite.

Several tokens, including HYPE, ZRO, and SUI, are set for significant unlocks, with disclosed amounts exceeding $540 million. Important industry events such as Paris Blockchain Week, Hong Kong Web3 Carnival, and Bitcoin Las Vegas 2026 are also on the agenda.

As policies, data releases, token unlocks, and global conferences progress concurrently, market volatility and thematic rotations may intensify in April. The convergence of global focal events highlights the core trajectory of Web3 developments in April 2026.

data.title: Kuwait Reports Iranian Drone Attack on Fuel Tanks at International Airport
data.description: Kuwait has reported that Iranian drones targeted fuel tanks at Kuwait International Airport, causing a fire. According to BlockBeats, the incident was confirmed by the Kuwait News Agency on April 1. No casualties have been reported so far.

data.title: FIFA President Confirms Iran's Participation in World Cup Despite Tensions
data.description: FIFA President Gianni Infantino has confirmed that Iran will participate in the World Cup in the United States in June, despite ongoing armed conflicts between Iran and the U.S. According to Odaily, Infantino expressed his commitment to supporting the Iranian team. Iran is scheduled to play all its Group G matches in the U.S., with two games in Los Angeles and one in Seattle. Previously, the Iranian Football Federation had advocated for relocating the team's three World Cup group matches from the U.S. to Mexico. The Iranian Ministry of Sports has prohibited national and club sports teams from traveling to countries it considers hostile until further notice.

data.title: Zcash fixes critical vulnerability: This vulnerability threatened the security of over 25,000 ZEC tokens, worth approximately $6.5 million.
data.description: Privacy coin Zcash recently disclosed and patched a critical security vulnerability that could have been exploited by malicious miners to transfer over 25,000 ZEC (approximately $6.5 million) from the deprecated Sprout privacy pool. Security researcher Alex “Scalar” Sol disclosed the vulnerability on March 23rd, stating that the zcashd node skipped proof verification when processing transactions involving the Sprout pool. The official statement indicated that the vulnerability had persisted since July 2020 but had not been exploited, and user funds remained safe. The development team released version 6.12.0 to fix the vulnerability, and major mining pools upgraded and deployed the fix within days. Furthermore, unaffected Zebra full nodes have the ability to trigger chain forks, providing additional protection should the vulnerability be exploited. It was disclosed that although the Sprout pool closed new deposits in November 2020, approximately 25,424 ZEC remained unmigrated. Even if the vulnerability is exploited, Zcash's "turnstile" mechanism prevents inflationary increases, ensuring the total supply is not exceeded. This vulnerability was discovered with AI assistance, and the researcher will receive a bounty of 200 ZEC (approximately $51,000). It's worth noting that this is not the first time Zcash has encountered a major vulnerability; back in 2019, it fixed a serious flaw that could have led to unlimited issuance. (Decrypt)

data.title: USD.AI token airdrop applications are now open.
data.description: USD.AI officially announced on X that the CHIP airdrop is now open for application, and participants in both the ICO and the airdrop can now claim their prizes. The application deadline is May 30, 2026.

data.title: FIFA President: Iran will still participate in the World Cup and compete in the United States.
data.description: FIFA President Gianni Infantino stated that despite the ongoing armed conflict between Iran and the United States, a co-host country for the World Cup, Iran will still participate in the World Cup in the US in June as planned. Infantino said he would do everything possible to support the Iranian team. Iran is scheduled to play all of its Group G matches in the US, two in Los Angeles and one in Seattle. Previously, the Iranian Football Federation had strongly advocated moving the team's three World Cup group stage matches from the US to Mexico. The Iranian Ministry of Sports has banned the national team and club sports teams from traveling to countries it considers hostile until further notice.

data.title: Bitcoin Holds Steady Above $68,000 Amid Political Developments
data.description: Bitcoin maintained its position above $68,000 early Wednesday in Asia, marking a recovery after a five-month losing streak concluded in March. According to NS3.AI, the cryptocurrency, along with other risk assets, received a boost from U.S. President Donald Trump's announcement of plans to end the conflict with Iran within weeks. Meanwhile, Ether remained stable above $2,100.

data.title: Texas to Review Cryptocurrency Regulations in Upcoming Legislative Session
data.description: Texas Lieutenant Governor Dan Patrick has announced the inclusion of cryptocurrency and prediction markets in the primary agenda for the next legislative session scheduled for January. According to NS3.AI, Patrick stated that one interim task will focus on assessing the alignment of Texas laws and regulations with federal standards in the cryptocurrency and blockchain sectors. Additionally, another interim task will examine the oversight of cryptocurrency kiosks across the state.

data.title: Hong Kong will legislate a reporting framework for crypto assets, aiming to complete it by 2026.
data.description: At the 2026 Annual Tax Seminar of the Association of Chartered Certified Accountants (ACCA) Hong Kong Branch, Hong Kong's Under Secretary for Financial Services and the Treasury, Chan Ho-lim, stated that the OECD has revised its Common Reporting Standard (CRS) to include new digital financial products such as central bank digital currencies and optimized the reporting and due diligence requirements for financial institutions. Furthermore, the OECD has released the Crypto Asset Reporting Framework (CARF) to enable tax jurisdictions to automatically exchange crypto asset transaction data, improving transaction transparency. The Hong Kong Legislative Council has given support to complete legislation by 2026. (Aastocks)

data.title: Analysis: Bitcoin's "safe-haven" myth fails amid US-Iran conflict; ETF funds reshape pricing logic.
data.description: 10x Research published an article on its X platform stating that against the backdrop of the current US-Iran conflict, Bitcoin has not demonstrated its "anti-inflation" or "safe-haven asset" attributes; instead, it has fallen in tandem with other risky assets, indicating a shift in its price-driving logic. The launch of Bitcoin ETFs has introduced a new group of investors to the market, mostly from Wall Street, who focus more on macroeconomic variables than on-chain applications or network growth indicators. However, not all "macro" indicators apply to Bitcoin. Some retail investors still rely on narratives of "four-year cycles" or even extended to "five-year cycles," leading to continued long positions during the decline. Currently, the market generally misinterprets Bitcoin, viewing it as a safe-haven asset, over-relying on ineffective liquidity models, and ignoring the key macroeconomic factors that truly drive the cycle.

data.title: Gauntlet: Resolv has not yet announced a remedy plan; a claims agreement will be established if assets are recovered.
data.description: DeFi research and risk management firm Gauntlet posted on the X platform that Resolv Labs has not released a remediation plan after the exploit incident, forcing Gauntlet to seek full recovery of funds through various means. To minimize the impact, Gauntlet has removed several vault markets. If assets are recovered, claims agreements will be established for affected liquidity providers. Current key measures include: 1. The wstUSR/USDC market has been removed from the mainnet USDC Core (v1), affecting approximately $7.6 million in liquidity; 2. The wstUSR/USDC, PT-RLP-9APR2026/USDC, and RLP/USDC markets have been removed from USDC Frontier (v1.1), affecting approximately $4.3 million in liquidity; 3. The USR/USDC market has been removed from Seamless USDC (v1.1) and Extrafi XLend USDC (v1.1); 4. The markets related to Resolv USDC (v1.1) will be removed after the 3-day lock-up period ends.

data.title: CoinShares has transferred 10,720 BTC to a new wallet in the past two days, worth over $700 million.
data.description: According to Lookonchain, CoinShares has transferred 10,720 BTC to a new wallet in the past two days, worth approximately $720 million, marking the largest BTC outflow from the institution.
